question: On which days does the speaker have classes?
answer_en: Monday, Wednesday, Friday
answer_ja: 月曜日、水曜日、金曜日

question: What time do the classes start on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday?
answer_en: 9 o'clock
answer_ja: 9時

question: When do the speakers usually have lunch?
answer_en: At noon
answer_ja: 正午

question: Why does the afternoon not seem so long to the speaker?
options: Because they eat lunch at noon
Because they sleep in the afternoon
answer_en: Because they eat lunch at noon
answer_ja: 正午に昼食を食べるから

question: What time does the family eat dinner every night?
answer_en: 6 o'clock
answer_ja: 6時

question: What was Lexi doing up past midnight?
answer_en: Working on the computer
answer_ja: コンピューターで作業していた

question: Did Jack finish his work late at night?
answer_en: No
answer_ja: いいえ

question: What did Angie do last night?
answer_en: Read a book about France
answer_ja: フランスについての本を読んだ

question: Why does the speaker hate working all night?
options: Because mornings are very hard without sleep
answer_en: Because mornings are very hard without sleep
answer_zh: 因為沒睡覺早上很難熬
answer_ja: 睡眠不足の朝はとてもつらいから

question: What time did Lexi get up this morning?
answer_en: Almost 8 o'clock
answer_ja: ほぼ8時

question: Which classes does the speaker have for beginners?
answer_en: Great classes
answer_ja: 初心者向けのクラス

question: What days does the other speaker have classes?
answer_en: Tuesdays and Thursdays
answer_ja: 火曜日と木曜日

question: What time does the other speaker start and finish classes?
options: Starts at 1 PM and finishes at 6 PM
Starts at 9 AM and finishes at 12 PM
Starts at noon and finishes at 5 PM
Starts at 8 AM and finishes at 3 PM
answer_en: Starts at 1 PM and finishes at 6 PM
answer_zh: 下午一點開始，六點結束
answer_ja: 午後1時に始まり午後6時に終わる

question: What does the speaker say about eating lunch together?
options: They can eat together because they all have lunch at noon
They eat lunch at different times
They eat lunch in the morning
answer_en: They can eat together because they all have lunch at noon
answer_zh: 他們都中午吃午餐，可以一起吃
answer_ja: みんな正午に昼食をとるので一緒に食べられる

question: What was wrong with Lexi when the speaker saw him?
options: He looked very bad and tired
answer_en: He looked very bad and tired
answer_zh: 他看起來很糟糕且疲倦
answer_ja: 彼はとても疲れて見えた

question: Why did Lexi stay up late last night?
options: He was working on the computer
answer_en: He was working on the computer
answer_ja: 彼はコンピューターで作業していた

question: What time did Lexi go to bed last night?
answer_en: 3 a.m.
answer_ja: 午前3時

question: What time does Lexi start work?
answer_ja: 午前8時30分

question: Why does Lexi look like he doesn't have fresh clothes on?
options: Because he wore the same clothes last night
Because he forgot to wash clothes
answer_en: Because he wore the same clothes last night
answer_zh: 因為他穿著昨晚的同一件衣服
answer_ja: 彼は昨夜と同じ服を着ているから

question: What does the speaker suggest Lexi should do?
options: Go home, take a shower, and start the day over
answer_en: Go home, take a shower, and start the day over
answer_zh: 回家洗澡，重新開始一天
answer_ja: 家に帰ってシャワーを浴びて一日をやり直す

question: What does 'intermediate' mean in the context of classes?
answer_en: Between beginner and advanced
answer_zh: 介於初學者和高級之間
answer_ja: 初心者と上級者の間

question: What does 'past midnight' mean?
answer_en: After 12 a.m.
answer_ja: 午前0時以降

question: What does 'alarm goes off' mean?
answer_en: The alarm rings
answer_ja: アラームが鳴る

question: What does 'finish everything on time' mean?
options: Complete all tasks before the deadline
answer_en: Complete all tasks before the deadline
answer_zh: 在截止時間前完成所有任務
answer_ja: 期限内にすべての作業を終える

question: What does 'starving' mean in the context?
answer_en: Very hungry
answer_ja: とてもお腹が空いている

question: What does 'take work home' mean?
options: Bring work to do at home
answer_en: Bring work to do at home
answer_ja: 仕事を家に持ち帰る

question: What does 'get a good night's sleep' mean?
answer_en: Sleep well during the night
answer_ja: 夜によく眠る

question: What does 'finish all your work earlier' imply?
options: Complete work before the usual time
answer_en: Complete work before the usual time
answer_ja: 通常より早く仕事を終える

question: What does 'looks terrible' mean?
answer_en: Appears very bad or unhealthy
answer_zh: 看起來很糟糕或不健康
answer_ja: とても悪そうまたは不健康に見える

question: 字彙與片語 fallback
answer_en: A
answer_ja: A

question: How would you describe your daily schedule in English?
options: I have classes in the morning and lunch at noon
answer_en: I have classes in the morning and lunch at noon
answer_zh: 我早上有課，中午吃午餐
answer_ja: 私は午前中に授業があり、正午に昼食をとります

question: How do you say 'I am very tired because I worked late' in English?
options: I am very tired because I worked late
I am happy because I worked late
I am hungry because I worked late
I am excited because I worked late
answer_en: I am very tired because I worked late
answer_zh: 我很累，因為我工作到很晚
answer_ja: 遅くまで働いたのでとても疲れています

question: How would you invite someone to eat lunch together at noon?
options: Let's eat lunch together at noon
answer_en: Let's eat lunch together at noon
answer_zh: 我們中午一起吃午餐吧
answer_ja: 正午に一緒に昼食を食べましょう

question: How do you explain being late because you didn't get up on time?
options: I was late because I didn't get up on time
answer_en: I was late because I didn't get up on time
answer_zh: 我遲到了，因為我沒有準時起床
answer_ja: 時間通りに起きなかったので遅れました

question: How would you describe feeling hungry before lunch in English?
answer_en: I am starving before lunch
answer_ja: 昼食前にとてもお腹が空いています

question: How do you say 'I need to take a shower and start the day fresh' in English?
options: I need to take a shower and start the day fresh
answer_en: I need to take a shower and start the day fresh
answer_zh: 我需要洗澡，重新開始一天
answer_ja: シャワーを浴びて新たに一日を始める必要があります

question: How would you explain why you look tired to a friend?
options: I didn't get much sleep last night
answer_en: I didn't get much sleep last night
answer_ja: 昨夜あまり眠れませんでした

question: How do you say 'My classes are in the morning' in English?
options: My classes are in the morning
My classes are in the afternoon
answer_en: My classes are in the morning
answer_ja: 私の授業は午前中です

question: How would you say 'I finish all my work on time' in English?
options: I finish all my work on time
answer_en: I finish all my work on time
answer_ja: 私はすべての仕事を時間通りに終えます

question: How do you express that you like eating lunch at noon?
options: I like eating lunch at noon
answer_en: I like eating lunch at noon
answer_ja: 私は正午に昼食を食べるのが好きです
